{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Nifty -0.88% breaking below 24,000, VIX +7.8% to 18.16 signals elevated fear. PSU Banks -1.87%, Realty -2.4%, Energy -1.35% — broad risk-off. However, defensive pockets (Pharma +0.7%, IT +0.24%) and quality individual names (COFORGE +7.6%, TATACONSUM +8.6%, THERMAX +9.3%) are working on Q4 catalysts. Book has 13 holdings, today's unrealized +₹4,636 offsetting realized -₹28,429. Priority: trail SLs on winners (COFORGE, MARICO, LAURUSLABS, SUNPHARMA, APOLLOHOSP), respect SLs on laggards, no fresh adds in the final 1h 18m given VIX surge.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23845,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [

Keep SL at 1355 (small loosening would be rejected — keeping at near-current 1355 risks reject; better leave at 1360). Correcting: keeping SL at 1360 — no modify. Actually emitting HOLD instead. [Treat as HOLD — SL 1360 is correct trail level at 1.7% gap from CMP, above entry 1259 locking +8% gain.]"

  "watchlist_notes": "Reviewed BULLISH watchlist candidates and chose NOT to admit fresh entries this tick: (1) COFORGE — already held. (2) THERMAX (+9.3% gap-up, then faded -7% off high to 4570) — chase risk into close, MACD bearish crossover on daily, intraday reversal pattern. NO_ACTION. (3) TATACONSUM — already have pending BUY @ 1240 (CMP 1250.50, won't fill). Considered CANCEL but the limit is ~0.8% below CMP and stock could pull back tomorrow; leaving order live. (4) UPL, BIOCON, KOTAKBANK, MCX, HCLTECH, INFY — qualifying but: VIX +7.8% surge today, 1h 18m to close, book already at 13 names (concentration), 5-day win rate 12% / profit factor 0.3x signals the strategy is in drawdown and admit-bar should be RAISED not lowered. (5) TORNTPHARM — pharma cluster already represented by SUNPHARMA + LAURUSLABS + LALPATHLAB (3 names, healthcare cluster cap-near). Adding 4th would breach cluster discipline per Rule 10. Per Rule 18: explicit per-name reject rationale provided. Will re-scan tomorrow for fresh setups with lower VIX and better deployment opportunity.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Deployment 52% (below 80% soft target). Cash ₹462,912 idle is intentional today given VIX +7.8% spike, broad risk-off (PSU Bank -1.87%, Realty -2.4%, Energy -1.35%), and 5-day strategy drawdown (12% win rate, profit factor 0.3x). Adding fresh longs into elevated VIX with this win-rate signal would compound the drawdown. Today's action: protect existing winners via current SL placements (COFORGE locked +8%, MARICO locked +1.8%, LAURUSLABS locked +2.4%), respect SLs on laggards (DABUR, BAJAJ-AUTO, GOLDBEES, LALPATHLAB, POLYCAB). Pending TATACONSUM BUY @ 1240 left live — may fill on pullback. Pending HFCL MIS BUY @ 133.50 is stale (placed 7764m ago = ~5.4 days) — CANCEL action requested below."
